description: User scrolls down the 'Adult 1' passenger details form to reveal the Date of Birth and optional membership fields.
frame_description: The view shifts from the top of the passenger details form to the middle section containing rewards and frequent flyer options.

description: User pauses to examine the 'Price summary' section on the right side of the page.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the price summary sidebar while the user reviews the costs.

description: User scrolls further down to the bottom of the form, revealing the phone number, email fields, and marketing preference checkbox.
frame_description: The page content moves up to show the contact information and email subscription section.

description: User pauses while reviewing the contact information section, specifically near the email input field.
frame_description: The cursor rests in the main form area near the email field after scrolling.

description: User hovers the cursor over the 'Feedback' tab on the right side of the browser window.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned directly over the red vertical 'Feedback' button on the right edge of the screen.
